title: Spanish king reopens debate on conquest of Mexico by acknowledging 'abuse'
summary_full: King Felipe appears to have helped thaw frosty relations with Mexico while reviving a fierce debate over events 500 years ago.
summary_public: King Felipe appears to have helped thaw frosty relations with Mexico while reviving a fierce debate over events 500 years ago.
